ddls:
CREATE TABLE "menu_items" (
  "menu_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each menu item */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the menu item */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the menu item */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the menu item belongs to */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the menu item image */,
  "calories" INTEGER /* Calories of the menu item */,
  "allergen_info" TEXT /* Allergen information for the menu item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("menu_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_menu_items_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "territories" (
  "territory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each territory */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the territory */,
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the currency used in the territory */,
  "tax_rate" REAL /* Tax rate applied in the territory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("territory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_territories_currency_id FOREIGN KEY ("currency_id") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "currencies" (
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each currency */,
  "code" TEXT /* Code of the currency (e.g., BND, USD) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the currency */,
  "exchange_rate" REAL /* Current exchange rate with respect to the base currency (USD) */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the currency (e.g., $, £) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "menu_id" INTEGER /* ID of the menu item */,
  "territory_id" INTEGER /* ID of the territory */,
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the currency */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the menu item in the specified currency */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the price becomes effective */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the price expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prices_territory_id FOREIGN KEY ("territory_id") REFERENCES territories ("territory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prices_currency_id FOREIGN KEY ("currency_id") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prices_menu_id FOREIGN KEY ("menu_id") REFERENCES menu_items ("menu_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale transaction */,
  "menu_id" INTEGER /* ID of the menu item sold */,
  "territory_id" INTEGER /* ID of the territory where the sale was made */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the menu item sold */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue generated from the sale */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used (e.g., cash, credit card) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_menu_id FOREIGN KEY ("menu_id") REFERENCES menu_items ("menu_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_territory_id FOREIGN KEY ("territory_id") REFERENCES territories ("territory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., restaurant manager, sales analyst, admin) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotions" (
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotion */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the promotion */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the promotion */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the promotion */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the promotion */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount percentage offered by the promotion */,
  "promotion_type" TEXT /* Type of promotion (e.g., discount, buy one get one free) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promotion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotion_items" (
  "promotion_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotion item */,
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the promotion */,
  "menu_id" INTEGER /* ID of the menu item included in the promotion */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the menu item included in the promotion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promotion_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_promotion_items_promotion_id FOREIGN KEY ("promotion_id") REFERENCES promotions ("promotion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_promotion_items_menu_id FOREIGN KEY ("menu_id") REFERENCES menu_items ("menu_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_promotions" (
  "sales_promotion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales promotion record */,
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sale transaction */,
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the promotion applied to the sale */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Amount of discount applied to the sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sales_promotion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_promotions_sale_id FOREIGN KEY ("sale_id") REFERENCES sales ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_promotions_promotion_id FOREIGN KEY ("promotion_id") REFERENCES promotions ("promotion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the sales data */,
  "territory_id" INTEGER /* ID of the territory */,
  "menu_id" INTEGER /* ID of the menu item */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Total revenue generated by the menu item in the territory */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Total quantity of the menu item sold in the territory */,
  "average_price" REAL /* Average price of the menu item in the territory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_territory_id FOREIGN KEY ("territory_id") REFERENCES territories ("territory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_menu_id FOREIGN KEY ("menu_id") REFERENCES menu_items ("menu_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback record */,
  "menu_id" INTEGER /* ID of the menu item */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer (1-5) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment provided by the customer */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_feedback_menu_id FOREIGN KEY ("menu_id") REFERENCES menu_items ("menu_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "ingredient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ingredient or supply */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the ingredient or supply in stock */,
  "unit_cost" REAL /* Unit cost of the ingredient or supply */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the ingredient or supply */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ingredients" (
  "ingredient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ingredient */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the ingredient */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the ingredient */,
  "unit_cost" REAL /* Unit cost of the ingredient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ingredient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "menu_item_ingredients" (
  "menu_item_ingredient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each menu item ingredient record */,
  "menu_id" INTEGER /* ID of the menu item */,
  "ingredient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ingredient */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the ingredient used in the menu item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("menu_item_ingredient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_menu_item_ingredients_menu_id FOREIGN KEY ("menu_id") REFERENCES menu_items ("menu_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_menu_item_ingredients_ingredient_id FOREIGN KEY ("ingredient_id") REFERENCES ingredients ("ingredient_id")
)
